name: guariglia-baseball-scorecard-builder-v34
description: Guariglia Baseball Scorecard Builder Version 34 Revision 12 with a compact sticky app dock, integrated live pitcher selector, full defensive field, phone-simplified offense-only base-runner number labels, an on-deck and in-the-hole strip beneath the live field, synchronized live scoring, duplex PDFs, and mobile/desktop support.

scripts.check:js: node --check app.js && node --check baseball-data.js && node --check service-worker.js
